allow:
Bash(echo "=== 验证后端 API ===" && \\
echo "1. 健康检查:" && curl -s http://localhost:8000/api/v1/health && \\
echo -e "\\n\\n2. 商品列表:" && curl -s http://localhost:8000/api/v1/products | head -100 && \\
echo -e "\\n\\n3. 任务列表:" && curl -s http://localhost:8000/api/v1/tasks | head -100)

Bash(echo "=== 测试创建商品 ===" && \\
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/v1/products \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{
    "name": "智能运动手表 Pro",
    "brand": "TechWatch",
    "category": "digital",
    "description": "一款集健康监测、运动追踪、智能提醒于一体的高性价比智能手表，支持心率监测、血氧检测、睡眠分析等功能。",
    "target_audience": ["运动爱好者", "上班族"],
    "tags": ["新品", "热销"]
  }')

Bash(echo "=== 测试创建任务 ===" && \\
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/v1/tasks \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{
    "product_id": "prod_d530ad43ed77",
    "task_type": "image_only",
    "image_types": ["main", "scene"],
    "image_count_per_type": 1,
    "style_preference": "简约现代",
    "quality_level": "standard"
  }')

Bash(echo "=== 任务状态 ===" && \\
curl -s http://localhost:8000/api/v1/tasks/task_f971c27de5fe/status && \\
echo -e "\\n\\n=== 任务详情 ===" && \\
curl -s http://localhost:8000/api/v1/tasks/task_f971c27de5fe)

Bash(echo "=== 后端 API 路由检查 ===" && \\
curl -s http://localhost:8000/openapi.json | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
paths = data.get\('paths', {}\)
for path, methods in sorted\(paths.items\(\)\):
    for method in methods:
        if method.upper\(\) in ['GET', 'POST', 'PUT', 'DELETE', 'PATCH']:
            summary = methods[method].get\('summary', ''\)
            print\(f'{method.upper\(\):6} {path:40} {summary}'\)
")

Bash(echo "=== 前端 API 调用检查 ===" && \\
grep -rh "BASE_URL\\|request\\.\\\(get\\|post\\|put\\|delete\\\)" /Users/jfcoder/PycharmProjects/github/agent_part/frontend/src/api/*.ts 2>/dev/null | grep -v "^import" | sort -u)

Bash(echo "=== API 接口完整性测试 ===" && \\
echo -e "\\n1. 健康检查:" && curl -s http://localhost:8000/api/v1/health && \\
echo -e "\\n\\n2. 商品列表:" && curl -s http://localhost:8000/api/v1/products | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'✅ code={d[\\"code\\"]}, total={d[\\"data\\"][\\"total\\"]}'\)" && \\
echo -e "\\n3. 创建商品:" && curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/v1/products \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"name":"测试商品","category":"digital","description":"这是一个测试商品描述，至少十个字符"}' | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'✅ code={d[\\"code\\"]}, product_id={d[\\"data\\"][\\"product_id\\"]}'\)" && \\
echo -e "\\n4. 更新商品:" && curl -s -X PUT http://localhost:8000/api/v1/products/prod_d530ad43ed77 \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"name":"更新后的商品名"}' | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'✅ code={d[\\"code\\"]}'\)" && \\
echo -e "\\n5. 任务列表:" && curl -s http://localhost:8000/api/v1/tasks | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'✅ code={d[\\"code\\"]}, total={d[\\"data\\"][\\"total\\"]}'\)" && \\
echo -e "\\n6. 任务详情:" && curl -s http://localhost:8000/api/v1/tasks/task_f971c27de5fe | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'✅ code={d[\\"code\\"]}, status={d[\\"data\\"][\\"status\\"]}'\)" && \\
echo -e "\\n7. 任务状态:" && curl -s http://localhost:8000/api/v1/tasks/task_f971c27de5fe/status | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'✅ code={d[\\"code\\"]}, progress={d[\\"data\\"][\\"progress\\"]}'\)")

Bash(echo "=== 检查任务详情响应 ===" && \\
curl -s http://localhost:8000/api/v1/tasks/task_f971c27de5fe)

Bash(echo "=== 当前任务列表 ===" && \\
curl -s http://localhost:8000/api/v1/tasks | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
for task in data['data']['items']:
    print\(f\\"  - {task['task_id']}: status={task['status']}, progress={task['progress']}\\"\)
")

Bash(echo "=== 完整 API 巡检报告 ===" && \\
echo -e "\\n✅ 1. 健康检查" && curl -s http://localhost:8000/api/v1/health | grep -o '"status":"ok"' && \\
echo -e "\\n✅ 2. 商品列表 GET /products" && curl -s http://localhost:8000/api/v1/products | grep -o '"code":200' && \\
echo -e "\\n✅ 3. 商品详情 GET /products/{id}" && curl -s http://localhost:8000/api/v1/products/prod_d530ad43ed77 | grep -o '"code":200' && \\
echo -e "\\n✅ 4. 创建商品 POST /products" && curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/v1/products -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"name":"测试","category":"digital","description":"测试描述内容"}' | grep -o '"code":200' && \\
echo -e "\\n✅ 5. 更新商品 PUT /products/{id}" && curl -s -X PUT http://localhost:8000/api/v1/products/prod_d530ad43ed77 -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"name":"更新名称"}' | grep -o '"code":200' && \\
echo -e "\\n✅ 6. 任务列表 GET /tasks" && curl -s http://localhost:8000/api/v1/tasks | grep -o '"code":200' && \\
echo -e "\\n✅ 7. 任务详情 GET /tasks/{id}" && curl -s http://localhost:8000/api/v1/tasks/task_e8baf51f6fdb | grep -o '"code":200' && \\
echo -e "\\n✅ 8. 任务状态 GET /tasks/{id}/status" && curl -s http://localhost:8000/api/v1/tasks/task_e8baf51f6fdb/status | grep -o '"code":200' && \\
echo -e "\\n✅ 9. 删除任务 DELETE /tasks/{id}" && curl -s -X DELETE http://localhost:8000/api/v1/tasks/task_e8baf51f6fdb | grep -o '"code":200' && \\
echo -e "\\n✅ 10. 删除商品 DELETE /products/{id}" && curl -s -X DELETE http://localhost:8000/api/v1/products/prod_99bfba1cb111 | grep -o '"code":200' && \\
echo -e "\\n\\n=== 所有核心接口测试完成 ===")

Bash(echo "=== 检查创建商品错误 ===" && \\
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/v1/products \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"name":"测试商品","category":"digital","description":"这是一个测试商品描述"}')

Bash(echo "=== 检查商品创建和更新 ===" && \\
echo -e "\\n1. 创建商品:" && \\
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/v1/products \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"name":"测试商品ABC","category":"digital","description":"这是一个测试商品描述内容超过十个字符"}' && \\
echo -e "\\n\\n2. 更新商品:" && \\
curl -s -X PUT http://localhost:8000/api/v1/products/prod_d530ad43ed77 \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"name":"更新后的名称"}')

Bash(echo "=== 任务状态 ===" && \\
curl -s http://localhost:8000/api/v1/tasks/task_a80a98f9cfb9/status | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
if 'code' in data:
    d = data['data']
    print\(f'任务ID: {d[\\"task_id\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'状态: {d[\\"status\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'进度: {d[\\"progress\\"]}%'\)
    print\(f'当前步骤: {d[\\"current_step\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'创建时间: {d[\\"created_at\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'更新时间: {d[\\"updated_at\\"]}'\)
else:
    print\(data\)
" && \\
echo -e "\\n\\n=== 任务详情 ===" && \\
curl -s http://localhost:8000/api/v1/tasks/task_a80a98f9cfb9 | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
if 'code' in data:
    d = data['data']
    print\(f'任务ID: {d[\\"task_id\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'商品ID: {d[\\"product_id\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'任务类型: {d[\\"task_type\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'状态: {d[\\"status\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'进度: {d[\\"progress\\"]}%'\)
    print\(f'当前步骤: {d[\\"current_step\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'图片数量: {len\(d[\\"images\\"]\)}'\)
    print\(f'视频: {\\"有\\" if d[\\"video\\"] else \\"无\\"}'\)
    print\(f'错误信息: {d[\\"error_message\\"] or \\"无\\"}'\)
else:
    print\(data\)
")

Bash(echo "=== Redis 任务数据 ===" && \\
redis-cli hget "pvg:task:task_a80a98f9cfb9" "metadata" | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\(f'状态: {data.get\(\\"status\\"\)}'\)
print\(f'进度: {data.get\(\\"progress\\"\)}%'\)
print\(f'当前步骤: {data.get\(\\"current_step\\"\)}'\)
print\(f'更新时间: {data.get\(\\"updated_at\\"\)}'\)
")
